creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
This has always been the case,  INDEX has always been built for i386.

For instance the last INDEX for FreeBSD 9 which reached EoL on 31st december 2016

% ll INDEX-9*
-rw-r--r--  1 indexbuild  indexbuild  35549103 Jan  1  2017 INDEX-9
-rw-r--r--  1 indexbuild  indexbuild   2054804 Jan  1  2017 INDEX-9.bz2

% grep ^compat INDEX-9
compat10x-i386-10.3.1003000.20161027|/usr/ports/misc/compat10x|/usr/local|Convenience package to install the compat10x libraries|/usr/ports/misc/compat10x/pkg-descr|des@FreeBSD.org|misc||||||
